summary: Demo flow testing complete - all backend (10/10) and frontend (11/11) tests passed. Hardcoded demo phrase 'Mera beta 10th pass hai' and variants trigger instant profiler_complete response with Rajesh Kumar profile + 2 eligible schemes (Vidyasiri + PM-KISAN) + downloadable PDF. Response time < 500ms.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chat with 'Mera beta 10th pass hai' returns type='profiler_complete'
Backend: Response profile shows Rajesh Kumar, age 42, income 18000, state Karnataka, child 'Son, 10th pass'
Backend: Response includes 2 eligible schemes: Vidyasiri Scholarship and PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
Backend: Response includes pdf_url with /api/pdf/{id} format
Backend: PDF download at GET /api/pdf/{id} returns valid PDF (26KB)
Backend: Response time under 2 seconds (avg ~300ms)
Backend: Hindi variation 'मेरा बेटा 10th पास है' triggers demo
Backend: Keyword 'scholarship' triggers demo
Backend: Keywords '10th pass', 'student' trigger demo
Backend: tool_calls contain 2 documents_scanned (Vidyasiri + PM-KISAN Guidelines)
Frontend: MCP tool trace (data-testid='mcp-tool-trace') displayed with ELIGIBILITY_MATCHER
Frontend: Documents scanned section shows Vidyasiri + PM-KISAN Guidelines
Frontend: 2 eligibility cards (data-testid='eligibility-card-eligible') rendered
Frontend: Vidyasiri छात्रवृत्ति card shows 'पात्र' with reasons and benefit
Frontend: PM-KISAN सम्मान निधि card shows 'पात्र' with reasons and benefit
Frontend: Profile info displayed (Rajesh Kumar, 42 वर्ष, ₹18,000, Karnataka)
Frontend: PDF download button (data-testid='pdf-download-btn') rendered
Frontend: PDF button links to correct backend URL with /api/pdf/ prefix
Frontend: Chat input and send button work correctly
Frontend: ToolProgressIndicator streaming bullets work (may complete fast due to demo speed)
Frontend: Login flow works with mock OTP 1234
critical_code_review_comments: Demo flow correctly hardcoded with DEMO_PROFILE, VIDYASIRI_RESULT, PMKISAN_DEMO_RESULT constants
_is_demo_trigger() function checks DEMO_EXACT_TRIGGERS list and DEMO_SCHOLARSHIP_SIGNALS keywords
demo_stage_response() generates PDF synchronously and returns complete profiler_complete response
All DB writes in demo path wrapped in try/except for offline resilience
Agnost tracking call also wrapped in try/except to never fail demo
ChatBubble.js renders EligibilityCard components for eligible/ineligible schemes with proper styling
PDF download button uses correct href format: {backendUrl}{pdf_url}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo mode fully working. Exact phrase 'Mera beta 10th pass hai' and scholarship/student/10th pass keywords trigger instant hardcoded response: Rajesh Kumar profile (age 42, income 18000, Karnataka, Son 10th pass) + Vidyasiri Scholarship eligible + PM-KISAN eligible + downloadable PDF. Response time ~300ms. Auth uses mock OTP 1234. All DB writes and Agnost tracking wrapped in try/except for offline reliability. DEMO_MODE=true in backend/.env.

mocked_apis_list: demo_stage_response: Fully hardcoded demo flow with DEMO_PROFILE, VIDYASIRI_RESULT, PMKISAN_DEMO_RESULT
auth: Static OTP 1234 for any phone number
